description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, dark brown gable roof with two stone chimneys and a prominent overhang. The facade is characterized by half-timbered construction with exposed dark wooden beams and light plaster infill, set atop a stone foundation. The front includes a central wooden door flanked by small windows, a short set of steps, and a simple wooden railing. Windows are symmetrically arranged with yellow panes, and the side and rear elevations have fewer windows and more visible timber framing. The house sits on a grassy base, suggesting a suburban or village setting. Architectural details evoke a traditional European or Tudor style, with a focus on rustic materials and craftsmanship.
description: A traditional half-timbered house with a steep gable roof, stone foundation, and symmetrical yellow-paned windows, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a wooden door, steps, railing, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep roof, stone chimney, and a pair of yellow-paned windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wall with timber framing and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar window arrangement and visible stone chimney.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with small steps, simple wooden railing, and flanking windows; no porch or overhang.
